title: Roasted Gooey Tunisian Dish Bake
description: A delicious and gooey brunch dish featuring a Tunisian twist with chilli sauce and nimono-simmer, all in a scallop-shell vessel. This nut-free-friendly recipe is perfect for a weekend morning.
instructions: In a large pan, heat 1 tablespoon of oil over medium heat. Add the onion and cook for 5 minutes, until softened.
Add the black beans, roasted red peppers, and canned tomatoes to the pan. Cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Stir in the Tunisian harissa and chilli sauce. Cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs and a pinch of salt. Add the cooked bean mixture to the bowl and stir to combine.
Prepare the scallop shells by rinsing them under cold water and patting them dry with a paper towel. Place a tablespoon of breadcrumbs in the bottom of each shell.
Divide the egg mixture among the shells, filling them about 3/4 of the way full.
Bake the dishes for 20-25 minutes, until the eggs are set and the tops are golden brown.
Remove the dishes from the oven and let them cool for 5 minutes before serving.
